patch.custom_loss:
extra_loss = 0.0
    W = sae.W_dec / (sae.W_dec.norm(dim=1, keepdim=True) + 1e-8)
    corr = (W @ W.T).pow(2)
    corr.fill_diagonal_(0)
    extra_loss += 0.01 * corr.mean()
    return extra_loss

extra_loss = 0.0
    W = sae.W_dec / (sae.W_dec.norm(dim=1, keepdim=True) + 1e-8)
    corr = (W @ W.T).pow(2)
    corr.fill_diagonal_(0)
    extra_loss += 0.1 * corr.mean()
    return extra_loss

description: Frequency penalty with lower threshold (5%) and higher weight

patch.custom_loss:
extra_loss = 0.0
    if fire_ema is not None and step > 100:
        freq_penalty = F.relu(fire_ema - 0.05).pow(2).sum()
        extra_loss += 1.0 * freq_penalty
    return extra_loss

description: Combine decorrelation (0.01) with frequency penalty (0.05 threshold)

patch.custom_loss:
extra_loss = 0.0
    W = sae.W_dec / (sae.W_dec.norm(dim=1, keepdim=True) + 1e-8)
    corr = (W @ W.T).pow(2)
    corr.fill_diagonal_(0)
    extra_loss += 0.01 * corr.mean()
    if fire_ema is not None and step > 100:
        freq_penalty = F.relu(fire_ema - 0.05).pow(2).sum()
        extra_loss += 0.5 * freq_penalty
    return extra_loss

description: Entropy bonus on activation distribution (encourage spread)

patch.custom_loss:
extra_loss = 0.0
    probs = out.latent_acts / (out.latent_acts.sum(dim=-1, keepdim=True) + 1e-8)
    entropy = -(probs * (probs + 1e-8).log()).sum(dim=-1).mean()
    extra_loss -= 0.01 * entropy
    return extra_loss

extra_loss = 0.0
    probs = out.latent_acts / (out.latent_acts.sum(dim=-1, keepdim=True) + 1e-8)
    entropy = -(probs * (probs + 1e-8).log()).sum(dim=-1).mean()
    extra_loss -= 0.1 * entropy
    return extra_loss

description: Reinitialize overused features (>20% fire rate) every 500 steps

patch.on_step_end:
if step > 0 and step % 500 == 0:
        fire_rate = fire_counts / max(total_samples, 1)
        overused = fire_rate > 0.20
        n_overused = overused.sum().item()
        if n_overused > 0:
            with torch.no_grad():
                new_dirs = torch.randn(int(n_overused), sae.W_dec.shape[1], device=sae.W_dec.device)
                new_dirs = new_dirs / new_dirs.norm(dim=1, keepdim=True)
                sae.W_dec.data[overused] = new_dirs
                sae.encoder.weight.data[overused] = new_dirs

description: Lower dead feature threshold from 50K to 10K

patch.custom_loss:
extra_loss = 0.0
    W = sae.W_dec / (sae.W_dec.norm(dim=1, keepdim=True) + 1e-8)
    corr = W @ W.T
    corr.fill_diagonal_(0)
    extra_loss += 0.01 * corr.abs().mean()
    return extra_loss

description: Weight reconstruction loss by per-dimension variance

patch.custom_loss:
extra_loss = 0.0
    residual = out.sae_out - x
    var = x.var(dim=0).clamp(min=1e-6)
    weighted_mse = (residual.pow(2) / var).mean()
    extra_loss += 0.01 * weighted_mse
    return extra_loss
